creator: charon@freethought.org
text:
apsfilter-5.1.2 does not exist at ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/apsfilter-5.1.2.tar.bz2 and hasn't as long as I've been looking for it (>1 month).  The other location listed (http://www.FreeBSD.ORG/~andreas/download/apsfilter-5.1.2.tar.bz2) gives a file whose checksum does not match that in /usr/ports/apsfilter/ and is corrupt (according to bzip2).

How-To-Repeat: Try to download apsfilter, then try to install it via the port.
